config.title: Ralph Loop
config.maxIterations.desc: Default maximum number of iterations for Ralph Loop
config.defaultMode.desc: Default mode for Ralph Loop sessions
config.defaultModel.desc: Default AI model for Ralph Loop sessions
config.promptFile.desc: Optional prompt file name (e.g., PROMPT.md). Leave empty to skip prompt injection.
config.taskFile.desc: Default task file for tracking progress (e.g., PRD.md, TASKS.md)
config.testCommand.desc: Command to run tests for backpressure validation
config.lintCommand.desc: Command to run linter for backpressure validation
config.buildCommand.desc: Command to run build for backpressure validation
config.packageCommand.desc: Command to run packaging (e.g., vsce package) for backpressure validation
config.enabledBackpressure.desc: Which backpressure commands to run after each iteration
config.notifications.enabled.desc: Enable notifications for loop completion and errors
config.notifications.onCompletion.desc: Show notification when Ralph Loop completes successfully
config.notifications.onError.desc: Show notification when Ralph Loop encounters an error
config.notifications.onStop.desc: Show notification when Ralph Loop is stopped
config.notifications.showProgressModal.d: Show modal progress notifications (more intrusive but ensures visibility)
config.notifications.includeStats.desc: Include iteration count and elapsed time in completion notifications
config.port.desc: Antigravity local server port. Set to 0 for auto-discovery.
config.csrfToken.desc: CSRF token from Antigravity DevTools Network tab (x-codeium-csrf-token header)
config.oauthToken.desc: OAuth token (ya29.xxx). Leave empty to attempt automatic extraction.
config.debugLogging.desc: Enable verbose debug logging in the Ralph Loop output channel
